channel.title: Cappuccino on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in Cappuccino on Barista At Home

item.title: How to Steam Milk at Home: Beginner Microfoam Guide (140–155°F)
item.description: Steam milk for lattes, cappuccinos, and flat whites in 30 seconds. Exact wand position, temperature (140–155°F), 9-step technique, milk types compared, and the 7 mistakes beginners always make.

item.title: Espresso vs Cappuccino: What's the Difference?
item.description: Espresso is a concentrated 1–2 oz shot of pure coffee. A cappuccino is espresso with steamed milk and thick foam. Here's how they differ in taste, caffeine, calories, and when to drink each.

item.title: Cappuccino vs Americano: What's the Difference?
item.description: Cappuccino vs americano: one is espresso with steamed milk and thick foam; the other is espresso diluted with hot water. Full comparison of taste, strength, caffeine, and when to order each.

item.title: Macchiato vs. Cappuccino: What's the Difference?
item.description: A macchiato is espresso with a small dollop of foam (1–2 oz). A cappuccino is a 5–6 oz drink with equal parts espresso, steamed milk, and thick foam. Learn the key differences in size, taste, and milk ratio.

item.title: What Is a Cappuccino? Definition, Ratio, and Types Explained
item.description: A cappuccino is an espresso drink made with equal thirds of espresso, steamed milk, and dense milk foam. Learn what separates a cappuccino from a latte, macchiato, and flat white.

item.title: Flat White vs Cappuccino: What's the Difference?
item.description: Flat white and cappuccino both use espresso and milk, but they differ in size, milk texture, foam depth, and strength. Here's exactly how they compare.

item.title: Cappuccino vs Latte: What's the Difference?
item.description: Cappuccino has thick foam and a stronger espresso flavor. Latte is larger and creamier with a thin layer of microfoam. Learn the differences in ratio, texture, taste, and how to make each.

item.title: Cappuccino Recipe: How to Make a Cappuccino at Home
item.description: Learn how to make a cappuccino at home — the classic ratio, steaming technique, and tips for getting perfect microfoam without a professional machine.
